#11387 — proactive suggestion bubble rendered DOM

Generated by ContinuousChatOverlay.suggestion.evidence.test.tsx from the real ThreadLine render path. The suggestion turn (source="proactive-interaction") carries data-proactive-suggestion="true", the "Suggestion" label, and the "Do it" / dismiss affordance; a normal assistant reply carries none of them.

1. Proactive suggestion turn (accept + dismiss affordance)

Suggestion
Want me to pull your latest balances?

2. Normal assistant reply (no suggestion affordance)

Want me to pull your latest balances?
